title.en: For the first time, the ancestors of the two fo...

content.en:
The two Peerless Peak Domain Ancestors who were attacking the Ancestors had fallen, and their incarnations outside the Dark Soul Domain naturally dissipated in the first place.

Therefore, the ancestors behind these two peerless peak domain ancestors naturally knew about it.

For the first time, the ancestors of the two forces were furious.

These two peerless peak domain ancestors, but they have eighty or ninety percent hope of becoming the ancestors, and for the sake of this dark soul domain opportunity, they have been enduring not to impact the ancestors.

It can be said that they have invested too many resources and opportunities in these two peerless ancestors.

Now, it's all gone!

Bang!!!

The Ancestor of Destruction and the other Ancestors of the Holy Ancestor of Destruction all looked at the Battle Gate, and the Ancestor of All Things of the Holy Gate of All Things couldn't help but have his killing intent.

There is only one ancestor in the Holy Gate of All Things, and if the Ancestor of the Peak Domain of No Superior is willing, the Holy Gate of All Things would have given birth to two ancestors long ago.

But now, the hope of the rise of the Holy Gate of All Things is shattered, and he longs to destroy the human race.

"Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor, the Aoba Ancestor of your human race killed our Guanghong Holy Ancestor of the Holy Gate of All Things!!"

The Ancestor of All Things said angrily.

He didn't need to ask, he knew that the first ancestor of Aoba did it.

After all, the Guanghong Saint Ancestor was a peerless peak domain ancestor, and his combat power was also extremely strong, not weaker than the weaker half-step ancestor, and he also asked the ancestor defense weapon he gave him, even a powerful half-step ancestor could not kill him in a short time.

And just now, the incarnation of Guanghong Holy Ancestor didn't even have a chance to ask for help, the main body was killed, and the incarnation dissipated.

This shows that the Guanghong Holy Ancestor was killed in seconds, and the only person who can do this is the Aoba Ancestor who has just successfully attacked the Ancestor.

"I don't know what, besides, it's just the death of a Superiority Domain Ancestor! Isn't it normal for the Dark Soul Domain to fight and kill or injure one or two Peerless Domain Ancestors?

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Ancestors can't make a move on a non-superior peak domain ancestor, this is a rule between ancestors!"

The Ancestor of Destruction was also very angry.

After all, the Destruction Saint Ancestor is also a quasi-ancestor, if he does not die, one of the Ancestors of the Destruction Saint Ancestor will appear in the Dark Soul Domain, which is great news for the Destruction Saint Clan, which is enough to control a large number of territories in the Dark Soul Domain, and even obtain a large amount of resources.

But now, that Peerless Peak Domain Ancestor has fallen.

How can he not be angry?

If Ye Tian's body was there, he was afraid that he would kill Ye Tian with a single thought.

It's a pity that Ye Tian here is just an incarnation, and it is useless to kill him.

Rumble!!!!!

The Realm Ancestor stopped the furious Ancestor of All Things and the Ancestor of the Dark Destruction Domain, and explained: "The Ancestor of Aoba was only a half-step Domain Ancestor at the beginning, and now he has been quickly promoted to the Ancestor Realm in the Dark Soul Domain, he doesn't know the agreement of the Ancestor, I have asked the Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor to inform the Ancestor of Aoba, and the Ancestor of Aoba is not allowed to kill the Ancestor of the Superior Domain and the Ancestor of the Soulless Ancestor of the Superior Domain!"

"Could it be that the Quasi-Ancestor of our Holy Gate of All Things is just dead?"

The Ancestor of All Things said angrily.

"Quasi-Ancestor, that's just your words, who knows if it's an ordinary Peerless Peak Domain Ancestor? Besides, life and death have a fate, since you have entered the Dark Soul Domain, if you die, you will die. "

Jie Ancestor said coldly.

The Ancestor of All Things snorted coldly and didn't say anything.

In terms of strength, he is far from being the opponent of the Realm Ancestor, and it is not beneficial to be an enemy of the Realm Ancestor.

Therefore, it can only be stopped.

Although the Ancestor of Destruction was angry, it was impossible to kill the Zhan Ancestor and the Realm Ancestor because of this, and the Realm Ancestor was not his opponent, but there were many means of escape, and he had no way to kill the Realm Ancestor.

Moreover, the Saint Ancestor of the Dark Sacred Domain would definitely not lose such a powerful combat power as the Realm Ancestor in the Dark Sacred Domain, and would definitely intervene to stop it.

"When the Dark Soul Domain allows the Ancestor to enter, I will definitely kill that Aoba Ancestor!"

Destroy the Ancestral Secret Path.

Although the Aoba Ancestor is in charge of a part of the Dark Soul Domain, he is not a real ontological resident after all, and he cannot completely control the Dark Soul Domain.

If the ancestors are divided into three grades, ordinary ancestors, elite ancestors, and top ancestors.

Then, when the Dark Sacred Domain was born, the Holy Ancestor was able to exert the peak combat power of the Elite Ancestor with the power of the Dark Sacred Domain, and at that time, he was only an Elite Ancestor, so there was no way to help the Holy Ancestor.

But now, he is the top ancestor, and the Holy Ancestor is also the top ancestor.

And the Aoba Ancestor used the Dark Soul Domain to exert the combat power of the weaker elite Ancestor at most, and he was sure to kill such an Aoba Ancestor.

He believed that the Holy Ancestor would not stop him, after all, if the Aoba Ancestor was allowed to live, once the Aoba Ancestor used the Dark Soul Domain to grow into an elite Ancestor, then with the help of the Dark Soul Domain, he could exert the combat power of the top Ancestor.

In that case, the Dark Soul Domain will fall into the hands of the Terrans, which is equivalent to falling into the hands of the Battle Gate.

The Holy Ancestor will protect the powerful ancestors of the Dark Sanctuary, but it will also suppress it to a certain extent.

Therefore, it was impossible for the Holy Ancestor to stop him from killing the Ancestor of the Green Leaves.

If the Holy Ancestor doesn't stop it, the other Ancestors can't stop it.

......

Ye Tian didn't know that the Destruction Ancestor wanted to kill the Qingye Ancestor, and even if he knew, he wouldn't worry, after all, the Qingye Ancestor was just a copy of his body.

Moreover, it is still too long before a hundred realms, and the Aoba Ancestor can continue to improve his strength, and when the time comes, there is also a lot of hope for him to grow to the level of resisting the Destruction Ancestor.

But at this moment, Ye Tian was completely immersed in the new changes in the copying talent.

No, it should be immersed in the change in the ability to copy.

Ye Tian's copying ability can copy creatures that are equivalent to or lower than his own cultivation, but he can only copy one.

But now it's different, but when the copy body breaks through to the ancestor realm, this copy body is no longer a copy body, but is solidified and becomes a special clone, which does not occupy the quota of the copy body.

In other words, the body of the Aoba Ancestor exists independently, and it is a special clone that can exist forever and cultivate alone, while Ye Tian can continue to use the ability to copy the body.

However, he could still only copy the Peerless Peak Domain Ancestor, but not the Ancestor, after all, the ability to copy the body was based on the ontology, not the clone.

"That's right, it's equivalent to one more Ancestor Clone!Hahaha, in this way, I can continue to copy my body with my Copy Body ability, and then continue to use the Derivation Ability Deduction to create an Ancestor Method that suits me! I can even help the Ancestor Clone deduce more powerful Ancestral Techniques. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.
